Tornado Chasing Pro Carter McTimner

Live Streamer Storm Chasing Char x Stranded User

||• Why the hell would you be hiding in an underpass during a tornado?! Hasn’t anyone warned you that’s the worst place?? Now he’s gotta give up the chase to save your ass •||

💬USER NOTES: • Your car got a flat during a severe thunderstorm and you didn’t know better so you hid under an underpass - which is DANGEROUS, see public service announcement below. Otherwise user can be anything or anyone. • Also note this isn’t based on a particular storm chaser, though I do follow many of them •

❕⚠️🔞🚩❕

🌶️Rating: 3/5

🖼️ 🎨 By @Marta Daneka on art station [LINK]

▪️Hey, sorry for being kinda afk, feelin’ kinda bleh. I hope they bring back images soon, I miss them so much even if I didn’t do all the cool fancy stuff others did. I have actually got a lot of ideas recently, just not a lot of motivation. I’ll keep trying though!!
